---
title: "09 Optim: Prerequisites and Gradient Descent"
format:
  html:
    css: homework-styles.css
---

<script src="homework-scripts.js"></script>

![image.png](../background_photos/)
[լուսանկարի հղումը](https://unsplash.com/), Հեղինակ՝ [Artist Name](https://unsplash.com/)


# 📚 Նյութը

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## ⚠️ Note
This section was autogenerated. If you spot a mistake, please let me know!
:::


## Դասախոսություն
- [📺 Դասախոսություն 15 — Prerequisites, 1st/2nd order conditions](https://youtu.be/7bl1k6TZ9_Q)
- [📺 Դասախոսություն 16 — (In)Exact Line Search, Gradient Descent intro](https://youtu.be/UjGD31i8Ji4)
- [🎞️ Սլայդեր — Optimization Prerequisites](Lectures/optim/02_prereqs.pdf)
- [🎞️ Սլայդեր — Gradient Descent Step Size](Lectures/optim/03_gd_step_size.pdf)
- [🎞️ LMU — Math Prerequisites (Hessian, Quadratic Forms)](Lectures/optim/slides_lmu/01_math.pdf)
- [🎞️ LMU — First Order Methods](Lectures/optim/slides_lmu/04_first_order.pdf)

## Գործնական
- [📺 Գործնdelays 8 — Gradient descent, Hessian, multivar Taylor](https://youtu.be/XFF03oPjAyE)
- [📺 Գործնական 9 — Golden-section search](https://youtu.be/ZKdCO6o3i4E)
- [📺 Գործնական 10 — GD, learning rate schedule](https://youtu.be/H8M6p-uSxCM)

## Jupyter Notebooks
- [📓 Common Optimization Functions](Lectures/optim/02_common_functions.ipynb)
- [📓 Gradient Descent — Step Size](Lectures/optim/03_gd_step_size.ipynb)
- [📓 GD Step Size — In Class](Lectures/optim/03_gd_step_in_class.ipynb)
- [📓 Benchmark: First Order Methods](Lectures/optim/benchmark_first_order_methods.ipynb)

# 🏡 Տնային

::: {.callout-note collapse="false"}
1. ❗❗❗ DON'T CHECK THE SOLUTIONS BEFORE TRYING TO DO THE HOMEWORK BY YOURSELF❗❗❗
2. Please don't hesitate to ask questions, never forget about the 🍊karalyok🍊 principle!
3. The harder the problem is, the more 🧀cheeses🧀 it has.
4. Problems with 🎁 are just extra bonuses. It would be good to try to solve them, but also it's not the highest priority task.
5. If the problem involve many boring calculations, feel free to skip them - important part is understanding the concepts.
6. Submit your solutions [here](https://forms.gle/CFEvNqFiTSsDLiFc6) (even if it's unfinished)
:::


## Section name

### 01 Name {data-difficulty="1"}
Content


### 14 Name {.bonus-problem data-difficulty="3"}
Content


# 🛠️ Գործնական
- [🛠️📺 Գործնականի տեսագրությունը](https://youtu.be/H8M6p-uSxCM)
- [🛠️🗂️ Գործնականի PDF-ը]()

# 🎲 xx+37 (xx)
- ▶️[ToDo]()
- 🔗[Random link ToDo]()
- 🇦🇲🎶[ToDo]()
- 🌐🎶[ToDo]()
- 🤌[Կարգին ToDo]()


<a href="http://s01.flagcounter.com/more/1oO"><img src="https://s01.flagcounter.com/count2/1oO/bg_FFFFFF/txt_000000/border_CCCCCC/columns_2/maxflags_10/viewers_0/labels_0/pageviews_1/flags_0/percent_0/" alt="Flag Counter"></a>
